Dialog.name: MSG_702_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 2 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 1 0 6}I'll begin searching for the monsters' weaknesses.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_702_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 2 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 3 0 6}It's done. I can start the analysis at any time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_702_1_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 2 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 4 0 6}Please tell me when to activate it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_702_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 2 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 2 5 0 6}I-I didn't know I had this kind of power...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_702_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}Your ability is just what we'd hoped for. It's even more accurate than Mitsuru's...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_702_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}So, they were changing their affinity! No wonder...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_702_5_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 -1 0 0}Hey, I can see the enemy's weakness now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_702_0_9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You can now use Full Analysis. It can be activated from the analysis screen. Try using it when you don't know the affinity of an enemy Shadow.[n]
